heading: LDAP Providers
body:
You can manage database user authentication and authorization
from all MongoDB clients using a MongoDB LDAP (Lightweight Directory Access Protocol) over TLS (Transport Layer Security).

Notable integrations include:

- Microsoft Entra ID: Set Up Authentication and Authorization with Entra Domain Services

- Okta LDAP Interface: Configure User Authentication and Authorization with Okta LDAP Interface

- OneLogin: Configure User Authentication and Authorization with OneLogin VLDAP
